---
title: "CDSim-Overview"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{CDSim-Overview}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```{r, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  collapse = TRUE,
  comment = "#>"
)
```

```{r setup}
library(CDSim)
```
stations <- create_stations(10)
sim <- simulate_climate_series(stations)
write_station_netcdf(sim, "example.nc")
